description: Anchore provides container image and software supply chain security tooling, including vulnerability analysis, policy evaluation, and SBOM-related workflows. Its products include Anchore Engine and Anchore Enterprise for analyzing and managing container artifacts.
summary: Anchore exposes a documented HTTP API for Anchore Engine/Enterprise and an AnchoreCTL CLI that wraps the same API; both use Basic auth with either user credentials or an Anchore-issued API key.
